decisions.description: DPC decisions, cross-border inquiries (Article 56 GDPR), enforcement notices, and binding decisions
decisions.notes: Pre-GDPR decisions under Data Protection Acts 1988/2003 not included

guidelines.description: DPC guides, codes of practice, regulatory advice, and FAQs
guidelines.notes: Active documents only; superseded guidance may not be present

known_gaps: Informal correspondence and unpublished regulatory exchanges
Decisions published after last ingest date
EDPB Article 65 binding decisions addressed to DPC (partial coverage)

refresh.schedule: Manual — trigger ingest.yml workflow or run `npm run ingest`
